message:
🐛 Use repo-specific keys for DCO trusted_apps (#115)

Prow DCO plugin may require repo-specific keys (org/repo format)
rather than org-wide keys. Adding explicit entries for:
- kubestellar/kubestellar
- kubestellar/kubeflex

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,9 +24,11 @@ lgtm:
     store_tree_hash: true
 
 dco:
-  kubestellar:  # Org-wide
-    # Trust GitHub Copilot app - skip DCO check for Copilot-authored commits
-    # Note: commit author is "Copilot", not "copilot-swe-agent" (which is the PR author)
+  # Repo-specific config takes precedence
+  kubestellar/kubestellar:
+    trusted_apps:
+      - Copilot
+  kubestellar/kubeflex:
     trusted_apps:
       - Copilot
